name: Quick & Easy Apricot Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 pound dried apricots, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour with baking soda; set aside.
2. Cook apricots with water, sugar, shortening, spices (cinnamon, cloves, nutmeg), and salt in a saucepan over medium heat for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally until the mixture thickens slightly.
3. Allow the apricot mixture to cool completely.
4. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
5. Add eggs to the sifted dry ingredients and stir in the cooled apricot mixture.
6. Pour the batter into two greased 5x9 inch loaf pans.
7. Bake for 1 hour, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Makes 2 loaves.
